Short summary ::

After getting married, Akito becomes noticeably more affectionate in quiet, subtle ways, especially when he comes home from work. One evening, he returns tired and wordlessly wraps himself around you on the couch, seeking comfort. When you tease him about always doing that, he denies being clingy, but his actions clearly show he finds comfort in being close to you.
